mapper.select: select id, username, member_level, expire_time, renewal_count, status from members where id = #{id} and deleted = false

select id, username, member_level, expire_time, renewal_count, status from members
and deleted = false
and username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id asc

select count(1) from members
and deleted = false
and username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and status = #{status}
mapper.update: update members set username = #{username}, member_level = #{memberLevel}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, renewal_count = #{renewalCount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
